name: readme-press
description: Turn a long Markdown README into a professionally typeset, release-ready PDF book.

scripts.test:syntax: node --check bin/readme-press.mjs && node --check src/build.mjs && node --check src/config.mjs && node --check src/cover.mjs && node --check src/mermaid.mjs && node --check src/qa.mjs && node --check src/release.mjs && node --check src/render.mjs && node --check src/template.mjs && node --check src/transform.mjs && node --check test/package-smoke.mjs
scripts.fixture:build: npm run fixture:prepare && node bin/readme-press.mjs build --config test/fixtures/basic/readme-press.config.mjs --quality all --release-version v0.1.0 && node bin/readme-press.mjs build --config test/fixtures/persian/readme-press.config.mjs --quality all --release-version v0.1.0
scripts.fixture:qa: node bin/readme-press.mjs qa --config test/fixtures/basic/readme-press.config.mjs --quality all --release-version v0.1.0 --render-all && node bin/readme-press.mjs qa --config test/fixtures/persian/readme-press.config.mjs --quality all --release-version v0.1.0 --render-all
scripts.test:integration: npm run fixture:build && npm run fixture:qa
scripts.verify:publish: npm run test:syntax && npm run test:action && npm test && npm run test:integration && npm run test:package && npm run pack:check && npm audit --audit-level=low

author: Ali Najafi
